overview.title: Settings
overview.description: Manage your account settings and set e-mail preferences.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: This is how others will see you on the site.

account.title: Account
account.description: Update your account settings. Set your preferred language and timezone.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the appearance of the app. Automatically switch between day and night themes.

display.title: Display
display.description: Turn items on or off to control what's displayed in the app.

profileForm.usernameDescription: This is your public display name. It can be your real name or a pseudonym. You can only change this once every 30 days.
profileForm.emailPlaceholder: Select a verified email to display
profileForm.emailDescriptionPrefix: You can manage verified email addresses in your
profileForm.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a little bit about yourself
profileForm.bioDescriptionSuffix: other users and organizations to link to them.
profileForm.urlsDescription: Add links to your website, blog, or social media profiles.

validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 2 characters.
validation.usernameMax: Username must not be longer than 30 characters.
validation.emailRequired: Please select an email to display.
validation.bioMin: Bio must be at least 4 characters.
validation.bioMax: Bio must not be longer than 160 characters.

accountForm.name: Name
accountForm.nameDescription: This is the name that will be displayed on your profile and in emails.
accountForm.dobDescription: Your date of birth is used to calculate your age.
accountForm.languageDescription: This is the language that will be used in the dashboard.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.nameMax: Name must not be longer than 30 characters.
validation.dobRequired: Please select your date of birth.

appearanceForm.fontDescription: Set the font you want to use in the dashboard.
appearanceForm.themeDescription: Select the theme for the dashboard.

notificationsForm.communicationEmailsDescription: Receive emails about your account activity.
notificationsForm.marketingEmailsDescription: Receive emails about new products, features, and more.
notificationsForm.socialEmailsDescription: Receive emails for friend requests, follows, and more.
notificationsForm.securityEmailsDescription: Receive emails about your account activity and security.
notificationsForm.mobileTitle: Use different settings for my mobile devices
notificationsForm.mobileDescriptionPrefix: You can manage your mobile notifications in the

displayForm.sidebarDescription: Select the items you want to display in the sidebar.

validation.itemsRequired: You have to select at least one item.
